- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - React app with simple form specified.

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created Vite React project structure manually.

- [x] Customize the Project - Added simple form to App.jsx.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions required.

- [x] Compile the Project - Installed dependencies with npm install.

- [x] Create and Run Task - Skipped, launched dev server directly.

- [x] Launch the Project - Started dev server on http://localhost:5173/
